name: hyperv
explanation: Hyper-V is collected via Windows Performance Counters (PDH) on the local host where the Agent runs — `template: instances/perf_counters` plus a per-integration metric set defined in code. There is no remote host/port in the default mode; the integration just reads PDH counters for the Hyper-V provider on the same machine. Auto-config reduces to: detect whether the Hyper-V role is installed (e.g. presence of the `vmms` service or the Hyper-V WMI namespace) and enable the check with the built-in METRICS_CONFIG. The hidden `pdh_legacy` template can target a remote machine via host/username/password, but that's an opt-in mode mirroring IIS.
notes: Same pattern as IIS (procedure pattern H, 'Local Windows host detection'). Trigger is 'Hyper-V role installed on this machine', not a network probe. Method `other` for the same reason.
